name: If / Else
description: Branch the workflow based on a JavaScript condition

outputs.name: true
outputs.description: Forwarded input when condition is met

outputs.name: false
outputs.description: Forwarded input when condition is not met

settings.label: Condition (JS)
settings.description: A JavaScript expression that returns true or false. You can use 'input.text', 'input.data', or 'input.files'.
